detail.entryFileTooltip: The main file the agent reads first when loading instructions. Defaults to AGENTS.md.
detail.canCreateNewAgentsHint: Lets this agent create or hire agents and implicitly assign tasks.
detail.instructionsBundlesLocalOnly: Instructions bundles are only available for local adapters.
detail.bundleModeTooltip: Managed: Paperclip stores and serves the instructions bundle. External: you provide a path on disk where the instructions live.
detail.rootPathTooltip: The absolute directory on disk where the instructions bundle lives. In managed mode this is set by Paperclip automatically.

configForm.capabilitiesPlaceholder: Describe what this agent can do...
configForm.promptTemplatePlaceholder: You are agent {{ agent.name }}. Your role is {{ agent.role }}...
configForm.promptTemplateWarning: Prompt template is replayed on every heartbeat. Keep it compact and dynamic to avoid recurring token cost and cache churn.
configForm.defaultEnvironmentHint: Agent-level default execution target. Project and issue settings can still override this.

modelDropdown.noModelDetected: No model detected yet. Enter a provider/model manually.

cheapModel.description: Used when a run requests the cheap profile (e.g. routine summaries). The primary model stays unchanged.
cheapModel.noAdapterDefault: No adapter default — choose a cheaper model
cheapModel.fallbackTo: No explicit cheap model selected — runtime falls back to {{model}}.
cheapModel.noCheapModelWarning: No cheap model selected and the adapter has no default. Cheap-lane runs will continue on the primary model with a fallback note.

bootstrapPrompt.warning: Bootstrap prompt is legacy and will be removed in a future release. Consider moving this content into the agent's prompt template or instructions file instead.
